english: Son of Jamadagni, hero, supreme destroyer of corrupt Kshatriyas
roman: Jamadagni sutam viram kshatriyan taka ram param

english: The Lord bearing the axe — I bow to Parashurama
Ornament of the Bhrigu clan, heroic, son of Renuka, the Lord
roman: Bhrigu kula bhushanam shouram Renuka nandanam prabhum

english: The partial avatar of Vishnu — I bow to Parashurama
roman: Vishnor ansha avataram tam Parashuramam namamyaham

english: The immortal one, counted among the Saptarishis, even among yogis
A hero equal to Ashvatthama — I bow to Parashurama
Whoever reads the Parashurama Ashtakam daily with devotion
roman: Parashuram ashtakam yah pathet nityam bhakti samyutah

hindi: शत्रुजयं बलं वीर्यं लभते नात्र संशयः॥
english: Attains victory over enemies, strength and heroism — there is no doubt
roman: Shatru jayam balam viryam labhate natra samshayah
